themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And when I saw that ye delivered me not, I put my life in my hands, and passed over against t...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּתְּנֵ֥ם: delivered - to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)".

3: I took my life in my hands and crossed over against the Ammonites

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
